# Blue Ridge Ops
> Technology consulting from Hamptonville, North Carolina

## About
Blue Ridge Ops is a technology consulting firm based in Hamptonville, NC. We build apps, design data systems, integrate AI, and keep production environments running — with senior-level expertise and no enterprise overhead. Founded by Peter, we work directly with clients across North Carolina and the United States.

Website: https://www.blueridgeops.com
Email: peter@blueridgeops.com
Phone: (336) 909-9421
Location: Hamptonville, NC

## Services

- **Mobile App Development**: Native and cross-platform mobile applications from concept to App Store launch, including architecture, development, and deployment.
- **Data Design & Architecture**: Database schemas, data pipelines, and reporting structures that turn raw information into actionable business insight.
- **Incident & Problem Management**: Rapid incident triage, root cause analysis, and permanent remediation for production issues.
- **System Monitoring & Health**: Proactive monitoring with alerting, performance baselines, and health dashboards that detect problems before customers do.
- **Production Support Staffing**: Experienced engineers embedded directly into client teams on the same tools, workflows, and communication channels.
- **Application Maintenance**: Ongoing bug fixes, performance tuning, and feature enhancements at the code level to keep production software running at its best.
- **Deployment & Release Management**: CI/CD pipeline design and management for reliable, on-time releases with rollback capabilities.
- **AI Integration & Enablement**: AI tool integration into real business workflows plus developer training to ensure lasting productivity gains.
- **Agentic Systems**: Design, build, and deployment of autonomous AI agent systems that handle multi-step tasks with tools and human oversight.

## Key Facts
- Based in Hamptonville, North Carolina
- Serves clients across the United States (remote-first)
- Senior engineers only — no junior hand-offs
- Free discovery call to start every engagement
- Project-based pricing and monthly retainers available
- Can mobilize within 24–48 hours for urgent production support
- Technology-agnostic: AWS, Azure, GCP, modern web/mobile frameworks, SQL/NoSQL, CI/CD

## How We Work
1. Discovery — Free call to understand your business and challenges
2. Strategy — Clear plan with scope, timeline, and costs in plain English
3. Execution — Weekly visible progress on builds, data, or operations
4. Support — Ongoing monitoring, maintenance, and optimization after launch
